events.title: Annexation of the Gym
events.description: The Benpire successfully established dominance over key sections of the Gym, citing its strategic value as a high-traffic zone ideal for recruitment and resource gathering.
events.outcome: Territory secured. The Gym is now under full Benpire control.

events.title: Occupation of Mr. Smiley's Room
events.description: Following the Gym annexation, the Benpire extended its reach into Mr. Smiley's Room, establishing a secondary stronghold.
events.outcome: Room claimed. Now a recognized Benpire territory.

events.title: Campaign for Mr. Walter's Room
events.description: The Benpire has identified Mr. Walter's Room as a high-value target due to its vast resources, most notably reported stockpiles of hydrogen bombs. Negotiations are underway to either purchase the room or form a mutual alliance.

events.title: Demotion of Kylie
events.description: By decree of the Grand Benperor, Kylie was demoted from her position. The exact cause remains classified by the crown.
events.outcome: Kylie retains the Head of TBD title but at reduced standing.

events.title: Establishment of the Imperial Bank
events.description: Knight Linkin was granted dominion over the Benpire's treasury and officially appointed Bank Owner, centralizing the empire's economic operations.
events.outcome: Bank operational. Linkin oversees all imperial finances.

events.title: Founding of Cammunism
events.description: Head Philosopher Camdyn formally unveiled Cammunism, a new philosophical doctrine intended to guide the ideological foundations of the Benpire.
events.outcome: Cammunism recognized as the official philosophy of the Benpire.

events.title: General Recruitment Drive
events.description: The Benpire plans to formally expand its peasantry through an organized recruitment effort. The admission form will be distributed and positions assigned.
